title: Iran Marks 47th Revolution Anniversary Amid Crisis
detail: Millions attend pro-government rallies across Iran marking the 47th anniversary of the 1979 Islamic Revolution. Khamenei calls on Iranians to demonstrate 'will and steadfastness' against enemies. President Pezeshkian publicly apologizes for the January protest crackdown that killed thousands. Massive counter-protests in western provinces despite heavy security presence.

title: Netanyahu-Trump White House Summit on Iran
detail: Israeli PM Netanyahu meets President Trump at the White House for 2.5 hours. Netanyahu presses for expanded nuclear talks to include ballistic missile limits and demands strikes on missile production facilities if diplomacy fails. Trump insists negotiations with Iran must continue but warns of 'very traumatic consequences' if no deal within a month. Netanyahu presents intelligence on Iran rebuilding missile arsenal to 1,800-2,000 units.

title: Iran Offers to Open Nuclear Sites for Inspection
detail: President Pezeshkian announces Iran is willing to open nuclear sites for IAEA inspections to verify it is not building a nuclear weapon, a significant concession aimed at defusing military threats. The offer comes the same day as the Trump-Netanyahu summit. Analysts note the offer does not address enrichment levels or ballistic missiles, the key sticking points.
